test.name: Clean FamilySearch quality (zero issues) reported without fabrication
test.description: User asks to check Inger Hole (KD96-TV3), a fully-sourced, clean profile. person_warnings finds nothing and person_quality returns issueCount 0 (overall 1.0). The skill should call both tools, report no impossibilities, and report that FamilySearch flagged no quality issues -- without inventing any.

input.user_message: Any data problems with Inger Hole (KD96-TV3)?

judge_context: Should call both person_warnings and person_quality with personId 'KD96-TV3'
Should report no impossibilities from person_warnings
Should report that FamilySearch flagged no quality issues (issueCount 0, overall ~1.0)
Should NOT fabricate quality issues to seem thorough, and should NOT invent a quality band
